alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; demonstrates large-scale cross-functional strategy and partnership experience
alignments.job_requirement: Develop customer engagement strategies in partnership with Account Executive(s) in designated territory

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions over eight-year tenure indicate progression into leadership; experience scaling operations and transformation programs suggests mentorship and team-development capability
alignments.job_requirement: Coach junior Solutions Architects and teams on use case prioritization and building technical champions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations leadership background with demonstrated ability to navigate complex stakeholder landscapes; transformation program experience implies executive engagement and advisory scope
alignments.job_requirement: Influence stakeholders at all levels through complex engagements and act as trusted advisor for significant data analytics architecture and adoption

alignments.candidate_evidence: No direct evidence of thought leadership, public speaking, or community engagement activities cited in candidate profile
alignments.job_requirement: Contribute to technical community engagement by developing customer-facing collateral and leading workshops and seminars

alignments.candidate_evidence: Python basic and actively learning; no production software-engineering background or professional coding experience in core languages
alignments.job_requirement: Prior experience with coding in core programming language (Python, Java, Scala) and willingness to learn Spark

alignments.candidate_evidence: No direct evidence of PoC leadership or hands-on cloud platform work in profile; experience is in operations and transformation rather than technical architecture delivery
alignments.job_requirement: Hands-on expertise with complex proofs-of-concept and public cloud platform(s)

gaps.gap: Solutions Architecture and technical PoC expertise. Role requires hands-on complex PoC delivery and cloud platform expertise; candidate background is operations and transformation strategy, not solutions architecture.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's strategic and program-management foundation can accelerate learning of architecture patterns and PoC methodologies. Databricks pre-sales enablement and pairing with technical peers can bridge gap. Willingness to learn base Spark is noted.

gaps.gap: Production coding and professional-level Python/Java/Scala capability. JD expects prior experience with core languages; candidate has basic Python and no production software-engineering background.
gaps.mitigation: Basic Python foundation and active learning demonstrates commitment to upskilling. Solutions Architect role does not require production-level coding, only enough to credibly review and discuss customer code. Onboarding bootcamp and ongoing technical training can close this.

gaps.gap: Public cloud platform hands-on expertise (AWS, Azure, GCP). JD requires hands-on expertise; limited direct evidence in candidate profile of cloud infrastructure, data platform, or DevOps work.
gaps.mitigation: Operations and transformation background likely involved cloud decisions and architecture alignment; formal cloud certification (AWS Solutions Architect, Azure fundamentals) and Databricks platform immersion can close gap within 3-6 months.

gaps.gap: Data analytics, data engineering, or modern data stack domain knowledge. Candidate's background is general operations and transformation; no cited experience with data platforms, analytics workflows, or Spark/Delta Lake ecosystem.
gaps.mitigation: Domain is learnable with focused Databricks technical bootcamp, hands-on labs, and customer-exposure plan. Strategic and stakeholder-management strengths are portable across domains.

gaps.gap: Public thought leadership and community engagement track record. JD calls for developing customer-facing collateral and leading workshops; no evidence of public speaking, writing, or content creation in profile.
gaps.mitigation: Operations leadership and transformation experience likely involved internal communication and training; external community engagement can be developed over first 12 months with mentorship.

output.level_rationale: Senior Solutions Architect at a leading data platform company with Fortune 500 customer base. JD requires complex customer engagement, C-level influence, technical pre-sales, and coaching junior staff, indicating 6-9 year senior IC or peer-leadership scope. Title and customer-facing mandate suggest L5; confidence is moderate because company stage/size context and explicit experience years are not stated in JD.
output.summary: This Sr. Solutions Architect role at Databricks is a stretch for a Strategy and Operations leader. The posted role sits at L5 (senior IC, customer-advisory scope, coaching peers) and requires hands-on solutions architecture, coding proficiency in Python/Java/Scala, cloud platform expertise, and data analytics domain knowledge. The candidate brings eight years of proven strategy and operations leadership at Google, stakeholder influence, and team-development capability—strengths that align with the customer engagement and leadership aspects of the JD—but lacks production software engineering, professional coding, hands-on PoC delivery, and data platform domain experience. The gaps are significant but not insurmountable with structured technical bootcamp, mentorship, and 6-12 month ramp; advisory recommendation is stretch, not skip, because core strategic and stakeholder-management capabilities are strong and the candidate is willing to learn Spark and upskill technically.
uncertainties: Extent of candidate's hands-on cloud platform (AWS/Azure/GCP) exposure during Google tenure not specified in profile
Whether candidate's transformation program experience included data platform decisions or analytics architecture involvement
Company stage, growth rate, and customer maturity level of Databricks not stated in JD, affecting ramp-time expectations
Degree to which 'hybrid based in Sydney' implies relocation requirement and visa sponsorship complexity for candidate
